raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AI, deepfakes, and disinformation pose significant dangers to democracy.",
    "Online platforms should restrict the spread of election-related deceptive deepfakes to prevent voter deception.",
    "Deepfakes can attribute false speech and conduct to individuals, threatening democratic integrity.",
    "Advances in AI facilitate the generation of deceptive content by practically anyone.",
    "AI and disinformation represent an existential threat to democracy.",
    "Foreign adversaries can exploit technology to misinform and divide voters during elections.",
    "Access to generative AI has made the dissemination of election-related disinformation more sophisticated.",
    "Deepfakes have been implicated in destabilizing elections in several countries, including Argentina, Slovakia, Taiwan, Bangladesh, and the US presidential primary.",
    "Many technology and social media platforms are reducing investments in trust and safety teams, increasing the risk of misinformation."
  ]
}
```
